endpoints.name: GET /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Security/assessments/{assessmentName}/subAssessments
endpoints.description: Get security sub-assessments on all your scanned resources inside a scope
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ASSESSMENTNAME}} with a real assessmentname. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.

endpoints.name: GET /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Security/assessments/{assessmentName}/subAssessments/{subAssessmentName}
endpoints.description: Get a security sub-assessment on your scanned resource
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBASSESSMENTNAME}} with a real subassessmentname. Replace {{ASSESSMENTNAME}} with a real assessmentname. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.

endpoints.name: GET /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Security/subAssessments
endpoints.description: Get security sub-assessments on all your scanned resources inside a subscription scope
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.
